revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-4-185

Lane slip (in Decca)

A fault due to temporary loss of signal, etc., whereby the Decometer, while reading correctly on its fraction pointer, reads incorrectly on its lane pointer.


{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Decca Lane slip}}
